case_title: S AND C MOTOR INC VS BALESTRIERI, ROBERT F.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY S AND C MOTOR INC AS TO DEFENDANT BALESTRIERI, ROBERT F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
